name: souroldgeezer-ops
description: Operations skills for issue, work-item, and pull-request lifecycle handling, with provider-agnostic cores and provider-specific extensions.

interface.shortDescription: Issue, work-item, and PR lifecycle operations.
interface.longDescription: Handle explicit issue, work-item, and pull-request lifecycle requests with provider-agnostic cores, provider-specific extensions, lifecycle markers, escalation gates, and verification discipline.
defaultPrompt: Use issue-ops to handle this GitHub™ issue end to end, delegating pull-request lifecycle work to pr-ops.
Use pr-ops to create or finish this GitHub™ pull request.
Use pr-ops to resume this pull request lifecycle.
